stemHtml: A pilot requests an oceanic clearance: "ABC 123 request Oceanic Clearance. Estimating Renso at 8:31. Request Mach 0.80, FL320, second choice track Bravo." Is this oceanic request correct?

options.a: Yes, because flight level, Mach number and route are contained.
options.b: Yes, because identification, Mach number, flight level, and ETA over a specific point is contained.
options.c: No, because there is no first choice track contained.
options.d: No, because there is no maximum acceptable flight level contained.
